title: Auqib Nabi: ‘There will be expectations, but I am focusing on my work’
description: Representing Capitals in his maiden IPL, Nabi, who was the toast of the 2025-26 domestic season as J & K won the Ranji for the first time, will test himself in the world’s biggest T20 league after he was roped in by the franchise for ₹8.4 crore; the medium-pacer from Baramulla opens up on the challenge ahead and the domestic season just gone by
